validation.serviceRequirement: Official website/social listing or Google Maps review mentions wash, dry, fold, delivery, valet, packed/ordered return, or drop-off laundry service.
validation.sameDayRequirement: Same-day filter includes only places with explicit same-day, same-afternoon, same-night, express-hours, or same-day review/listing evidence.
researchSources: Google Places API text search and place details
BrightData Google search and scrape_batch/search snippets

excluded.name: Laundry Soho Bar
excluded.reason: restaurant/bar false positive, not a laundry service

excluded.name: Lavadero Autoservicio Estados Unidos
excluded.reason: self-service listing; no clear staff wash-and-fold evidence found

excluded.name: Lave.rap Hipolito Yrigoyen
excluded.reason: review evidence points primarily to self-service

excluded.name: Lava Ya Laundry Gascon 732
excluded.reason: building laundry/equipment service evidence, not a public wash-and-fold storefront

excluded.name: 5asec listings
excluded.reason: dry-cleaning evidence was stronger than wash-and-fold laundry evidence

excluded.name: La Lavanderia de Oma / Centrodelavado Amenabar
excluded.reason: official site confirms service, but the matching Google Maps laundry listing found had fewer than 33 reviews

excluded.name: Laundry Buenos Aires
excluded.reason: official site confirms wash/dry/fold, but no matching Google Maps laundry place with 33+ reviews was found

excluded.name: Low-rated Google Maps laundries
excluded.reason: Removed entries with Google Maps rating of 4.1 or lower at user request.
